stemHtml: What occurs when a moist air mass ascends the north-facing slopes of the Pyrenees under a northerly wind?

options.a: Air is adiabatically cooled, and when the temperature of the air is equal to the dewpoint, orographic fog can form.
options.b: Air is adiabatically cooled, and when the temperature of the air is equal to the dewpoint, rain will fall immediatley.
options.c: Orographic fog can form on the north-facing slopes because there is no sunlight.
options.d: Air cools as it descends, forming clear air on the leeward slopes.
